data.body: RESOLUTION (signing): the epic 8d27, 297d, 1787, and bug ad48 are ALL closed + completion-verifier CERTIFIED (rebar verify-signature <id> --kind completion-verifier => 'certified' for each). Earlier 'unsigned' reports were a VERIFICATION-METHOD ERROR: I checked the rebar show --output llm 'attestations' field (misleadingly empty) instead of the authoritative verify-signature certifier. The CLI closes signed correctly all along — the 'CLI close-gate anomaly' was a phantom. Confirmed via: sign_manifest returned a signature; verify-signature certifies; the ticket dirs hold SIGNATURE.json events. Landing the client doc (change 682) next, then closing doc task 3584 signed.
